steps.title: Identify the key contrast
steps.content: Small white herons prefer areas with deep water during breeding season, but white ibises do not have this preference. This is the decisive contrast.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Increasing water depth would therefore be more likely to attract herons than ibises.

Choice C directly expresses this relationship. The other three either contradict the study's data (A), drift into unrelated territory (B), or introduce unsupported claims (D).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
